# TemporalPayload { #natural_features.TemporalPayload }

```python
TemporalPayload(
    name,
    object_type,
    clock,
    timebase,
    temporal_context,
    metadata,
    schema,
    values=None,
    times_s=None,
    time_bounds_s=None,
    onset_s=None,
    offset_s=None,
    label=None,
    confidence=None,
    track_id=None,
    dims=None,
    coords=dict(),
    extra=dict(),
)
```

Dependency-free native temporal payload for a modeling consumer.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [to_dict](#natural_features.TemporalPayload.to_dict) | Return a protocol payload made only of mappings, arrays, and scalars. |

### to_dict { #natural_features.TemporalPayload.to_dict }

```python
TemporalPayload.to_dict()
```

Return a protocol payload made only of mappings, arrays, and scalars.
